metadata.title: Lookout-DeviceCompliance-Remediation
metadata.description: When a device compliance or security posture degradation incident is created in Microsoft Sentinel by Lookout, this playbook enriches the incident with a detailed comment covering compliance status, device details, MDM integration context, and recommended remediation steps for the analyst.
prerequisites: 1. The playbook managed identity must be granted the Microsoft Sentinel Responder role on the Log Analytics workspace.
postDeployment: 1. Assign the Microsoft Sentinel Responder role to the playbook managed identity on your Log Analytics workspace.
2. In Microsoft Sentinel, create an Automation Rule that runs this playbook when incidents are created by the 'Lookout - Device Compliance and Security Status Changes (v2)' analytic rule.

metadata.description: Name for the Logic App playbook resource.

body.message:
🤖 Lookout Device Compliance — Automated Response Summary

Compliance Status
• Compliance Status: @{triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['additionalData']?['customDetails']?['DevCompliance']?[0]}
• Security Posture: @{triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['additionalData']?['customDetails']?['SecurityPosture']?[0]}
• Risk Score: @{triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['additionalData']?['customDetails']?['DeviceRiskScore']?[0]}/10
• Compliance Reason: @{triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['additionalData']?['customDetails']?['ComplianceReason']?[0]}
• Security Status: @{triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['additionalData']?['customDetails']?['DeviceSecStatus']?[0]}

Device Details
• Platform: @{triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['additionalData']?['customDetails']?['DevicePlatform']?[0]}
• Manufacturer/Model: @{triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['additionalData']?['customDetails']?['DeviceManufacturer']?[0]} / @{triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['additionalData']?['customDetails']?['DeviceModel']?[0]}
• Platform Risk: @{triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['additionalData']?['customDetails']?['PlatformRisk']?[0]}
• Lookout SDK Version: @{triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['additionalData']?['customDetails']?['ClientSDKVersion']?[0]}
• MDM Integration: @{triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['additionalData']?['customDetails']?['MDMIntegration']?[0]}

Actions Taken
✅ Incident enriched with Lookout device compliance and posture intelligence

Recommended Next Steps
1. If MDMIntegration is 'Fully Integrated', verify MDM compliance policy is enforcing access restrictions
2. If ComplianceReason is 'No Recent Check-in', the device may be lost or deactivated — consider escalating to MDM team
3. If ComplianceReason is 'Missing Security Client', coordinate with MDM team to re-push the Lookout for Work app
4. Contact device owner with remediation steps if SecurityPosture is 'High' or 'Critical'
5. If SecurityPosture is 'Critical', consider initiating MDM-based device quarantine
